chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1427 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 6031/2023 3.For hearing of main case 17-01-2024 Mr. Tarique Hussain Rajper, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the petition for quashment of FIR No.212 of 2023, registered at P.S, Shaheed Mir Murtaza Mirani, under sections 406, 420 & 506/2 PPC has agreed to withdraw the same with a request of issuing directions to the trial Court to decide application under section 249-A CrPC, which is to be filed by the petitioner therein, within a short while. Learned counsel for the State have no objection to it. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is dismissed as not pressed. However, trial Court is directed to decide application, if and when filed under section 249-A CrPC, before proceeding with the trial on merits JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
